web.markdown:
![Thumbnail (1920x1080)](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/WA14qV40JBQ/maxresdefault.jpg)
# [How To Turn Old Gym Leads Into Cash (No Ad Spend Needed)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WA14qV40JBQ)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [Gym Launch](http://www.youtube.com/@GymLaunch)
**Uploaded at**: 2025-07-18T09:00:52-07:00
**Published at**: 2025-07-18T09:00:52-07:00
**Length**: 12:11
**Views**: 7911
**Likes**: 25
**Category**: Education

## Description

```
Want to turn dead leads and old members into paying clients in the next 72 hours? This video breaks down the exact Reactivation Play you can use to squeeze cash out of your lead graveyard, and re-engage past clients who already know, like, and trust you.

We walk you through:
✅ How to craft 2 simple offers that crush
✅ The exact SMS/email schedule to follow
✅ What tools to use (or how to do it manually)
✅ And the key follow-up tactic most gym owners screw up

The average gym pulls in $5K+ from cold lists with this 3-day campaign—without running ads, without chasing leads, and without hiring new staff. If you’ve got leads or past members just sitting in your CRM collecting dust, this play is your low-hanging fruit.

Download The Gym Profit Playbook Here → https://scale.gymlaunch.com/playbookorganic

Join Our Free Skool Group - THE #1 GYM GROWTH COMMUNITY https://ww2.gymlaunch.com/skool 
(You’ll gain access to 20+ hours of training to help you acquire more clients, make more money, and scale your gym. Plus the opportunity to network with like minded gym owners without spam #GymOwnersOnly)

Ready to take your Gym to the next level? Book a Free Strategy Call with our team: https://www.gymlaunch.com/contact

Follow Us On Other Platforms :
Facebook → https://www.facebook.com/GymLaunch/
Instagram → https://www.instagram.com/gymlaunch/
TikTok → https://www.tiktok.com/@gymlaunch
Twitter → https://twitter.com/GymLaunch

Timestamps
00:00 Intro
00:47 What Is The Reactivation Play And Why It's Important
03:23 How The Reactivation Play Works
05:03 3 Day Drip Campaign
07:51 What You Can Expect From This
09:39 The Results We Got
11:39 Outro
```

## Transcript

Here's how you can turn old leads into thousands of dollars using a drip campaign that I'm just going to go ahead and give you today. If you're a gym owner, you've probably got a list of old leads and ex-members just gathering dust that you want so badly to cash in on, but you're just not sure how to do it. Well, today I got you. I'm going to walk you through a very simple 3-day drip campaign that you can use to reactivate old leads, schedule appointments, and hopefully, if you don't suck at sales, make some money. My name is Kale Owens, CEO of Gym Launch. We have helped over 6,000 gym owners around the world learn how to fill their gyms to capacity, increase their profit, and get their time back. All we talk about on this channel is how to build million-doll a year gyms. Now, we don't make any income claims. In fact, according to a study by JP Morgan Chase, you have less than 10% chance of making a million dollars a year in revenue in a business. Personally, I don't think that those are bad odds. But I digress. Now, before we get into the tactical stuff, we got to get on the same page about what a reactivation play is, why it's important, and where most gyms or agencies get it wrong. A reactivation play is when you contact old leads and ex-members with a specific offer or a set of offers with the goal being to get them to respond and schedule an appointment with you so that you can close them. It's pretty simple, right? I have a list of leads and I make an offer to you to get them interested. Again, that's really all it is. As a former gym owner and someone who runs a ton of traffic for Gym Launch, I can tell you that there are very few things more annoying than looking at all the leads that I've bought and realizing only a small percentage of them have actually booked an appointment, showed, and closed. It's extremely frustrating. And even though it's not wasted money, it can sure feel like that sometimes. And if we want to build a million-dollar gym, we're going to need to maximize every single opportunity that we have to get more members. And there's three main reasons why running this play consistently, key is consistently, needs to happen if you are serious about growing your gym. Number one, it's cash just sitting in your CRM. A lot of times I hear some gym owners say stuff like, "If they don't join the first time, they're not interested." Or, "I don't want to bother them." Or, "I only want dedicated people." Well, here's a hot take. That's a loser mentality. And if I was your competitor, I would be licking my chops because if you want to sit back and wait for the perfect avatar to walk through your door, be my guest. I'll just be over here working every lead I get like my business depends on it because it does. And here's the thing, people's lives change. Timing, finances, family, their health, all that can change in an instant. And just because someone didn't say yes last month, doesn't mean that they won't say yes now. You just got to ask. Reason number two is reactivations cost zero ad dollars. Aka, it's free.99, baby. If you're strapped for cash and you're sitting on a big list of leads, this play is the first thing that I'd be doing because you don't need a budget. You don't need to hire an agency. You just got to follow the play that I'm just going to go ahead and give you. And reason number three, my favorite. It's easy. Very few things in business can run on basically autopilot and get you appointments. Thankfully, this is one of them. You just got to do it right. Now, unfortunately, most gyms and agencies don't do it right. They spend a ton of time working on this big email and SMS campaign with some boring offer and then they blast everyone at the same time. Now, this creates two really big problems. One is like, what if the offer and the campaigns don't work? Now you just blasted everyone with it and you have to wait a bit before you can even test it again. Please don't do this. Problem number two is what if it does work? Now you're trying to get back to all the replies and that can be insane and then the whole opportunity gets wasted because you or your team can't work those replies in time. That's no bueno. Now, here at Gym Launch, this is what we found to work the best. Step number one, you're going to pull together a list of all of your old leads and inactive clients. Every single person that you have. Next, you're going to upload them into your CRM. Now, ideally, you're using something like highle. No matter what though, you have to have a CRM that can automatically do email SMS campaigns. All right? If you don't have a CRM that can send automated emails or SMS, you can do this manually, but that is going to be a massive pain in your peach. And I can't unrecommend that enough. Now, once you get all of that set, step number three is very simple. You're going to settle on two offers that you're going to send to your list. The reason why we do two offers is because we need an initial offer and then we need what's called a cleanup offer. Offer number one should be a transformation intro offer of some sort. What we found to work the best is literally called a transformation pass. Think of it like an invite to come in for a one-on-one body consult. You get a scan, maybe a Starbucks gift card. There's no training involved. It's literally just a sitdown consult to learn about how they can join a transformation program that they can lose a ton of weight or achieve X goal, right? There's no pressure in this and it's sexy because it's low friction. The second offer, what we call the cleanup offer, needs to be a free class or something very similar to this. It could be a free pass, maybe. And it's going to be sent as a last nudge, almost like a last resort during the campaign to try and push some of those people that didn't take advantage of the first one over the edge. Because here's the thing, what if they don't like that very first offer that you sent? Maybe they just want to come in and test you out. Maybe they want to do a test drive. They don't want to sit down for a consult. Maybe they want to see how the class actually is. Well, this gives you a chance to clean those up as well. And the most important part about all of these is that you're not offering discounts on your membership. You're just offering a consult or a free class. Once you've got that nailed down, you're going to set up a three-day drip campaign. And here's what that schedule is going to look like. Day number one is very simple. You're going to have three text messages. So, three SMS that are going to be sent back to backto back. The first one's basically like a quick intro that it's basically like a this week only type of offer. The second text message is going to be sent literally 30 seconds after and it's going to be the bulk of what the offer is. And this is going to be that transformation pass offer. And then the last one is basically going to be it's a third SMS that's sent 30 seconds after it's like, "Hey, sorry for all the text. I just want to make sure you got all the information." So three text messages are being sent day one. Then about an hour and a half after you're going to send one email that basically sums up and gives more detail into what's actually in the offer. That's it. So day one, you're just sending it to them. Now, it's really, really key. When you do this, though, the reason why we call it a drip campaign is because you're only going to send it to around 50 to 100 contacts a day. That's it. You're not going to send it to your whole list. You're only going to send it to a small subset of your list. And every day, you're going to add more people to that list. And you're going to start dripping it out over the course of however many days it takes to work through your list. So, day one, you're going to, let's say you send it to 100 people. Well, day two, you're going to send it to a new 100 people. But here's the thing. On day two, you're also going to be sending another SMS. So, it's just one SMS and you're going to be sending one email. That's it. The thing that we're sending again on this is we're trying to get them in for the transformation pass. That's all we're trying to get. And during this process, on day two, you're going to start another 100. Right now, day three comes around. This is where we do your cleanup offer. You're going to end up sending two SMS So, two text messages and that's it. No emails. So, all you're doing is sending two SMS offering a free class that you've got 20 spots. You're basically telling them that all of the spots were taken for the transformation pass. It's full. You're creating scarcity. You're creating urgency and that you have basically filled up. So, now they're thinking that everyone's super excited about this. They need to jump on something else. And you're like, "Hey, we went ahead. We got a bunch of people asking about this. So, we opened up about 20 spots for a free class. Go ahead, click the link below to schedule." Right? And so, that's it. It's very simple. And so by day three, now you're hitting another hundred. And what's going to happen is is over the course of however long you have, let's say you have a thousand people on your list. You're going to go through it in 10 days. And it's that simple. Now, you're probably watching this and you're like, "This sounds really cool. I'd like to try this, but what in the world should I include in my text messages or my emails?" Well, I've got you. Down below, there's going to be a link. You can download what we are calling the gym profit playbook. The very first play in the gym profit playbook is the reactivation campaign that includes all of the text messages and all of the emails that you can do. So you can get all of the copy, you can plug it in. You have to do the work, but you can plug it in and start sending it. All right, let's talk about what you can expect from this. We've run this a bunch of times and I'll walk through some things that we've learned so that you can just go ahead and cut to the front of the line, not have to pay the ignorance tax, and you can have the right expectations for this. Now, with this, couple really important notes. One is that we found is that most gyms are going to close around 0.05 to 0.1% of their lists. Right? So overall the total list they're going to close around half a percent to 1%. That's it. Right? Now when you're thinking about that you're like well that's not a lot. But here's the thing. You want to consistently run this. So as you have leads coming into your system you're going to set up automations to where after a certain amount of time they get dropped into this drip campaign. And the best part about this is that because you're only hitting a small portion of your list. You can also then change your offer if you find that you can maybe have a better offer. So, you can always test this a lot easier and you're not going to be overwhelmed by the number of responses that you can't reply back to them and actually get them scheduled for an appointment and come in and close them. All right? So, about half a percent to 1% of your list will close on average. Now, here's another thing. You can expect to have roughly a 5 to 20% reply rate on your messages. So, this would include your emails and your SMS. Now, here's the thing. You need to expect that you're going to get some people that are pissed off. It just happens. They may just tell you to f off. They may tell you like stop. You're going to get those, but you also need to work through those. The goal is to get a bunch of nos so that you can get closer to the yeses. You will get yeses on this. As long as you have actually been working leads or at least providing value in some sort. If you have an old lead list and you've done nothing for 2 or 3 years, please don't expect really anything from this. You should probably start sending them something. But if you have periodically sent something to them and they know who you are, where you're at, then you can expect to at least get a 5 to 20% reply rate on this, which gives you a fighting chance to get a bunch of people in and close them. Okay, so now let's talk about results, right? So the results that we had on the very first time that we ran this, and this is the very first time, right, is we had 11 gyms do it. The mediansiz list was 1,515 people. So that was the list size, right? So they had 1515 leads. That was the median number. And they ran this for roughly an average of about like 3 weeks. So over time they kind of dripped it. And they some did it at 50 people a day. Some did it at 100. So overall across the 11 that ran this, they did it for roughly 3 weeks. In that time span the median amount of cash collected was over $5,700. All done by pretty much high ticket closes. So most people came in on the transformation pass. Most people closed on that. and the median number of actual new members that they got was 11 new members. Now, for some of you, you're like, "Well, that doesn't sound like a lot." Yeah, but here's the deal. At this point, you've already paid for those leads and you've already spent the money. So, now we need to be able to capitalize on that. And I can guarantee you this, the best gyms in the world, the best businesses in the world, they're going to figure out a way to squeeze every little ounce of juice they can out of the money they're spending on their marketing. And so if you are serious about building a gym that's going to last, that's going to be ahead in the market, that's going to beat all the competitors and that's going to change more lives and ultimately be able to create hopefully financial freedom, time freedom for you, for your family, a legacy, all those things, we need to be able to optimize every part of the business. And this is why this reactivation drip campaign is so powerful. And so when you look at this, again, this is the very first time we had 11 gyms. Median number of leads was 1,515. median amount of cash collected in three weeks was $5,700 or more and the median number of new members that they added was 11. Now, since then, we are now testing a brand new campaign and this one's getting way higher reply rates, but we're also testing like a lower ticket offer. And so, it's absolutely smashing and the close percentage is way higher than the half a% to 1%, but we're not releasing that yet. That's reserved for our clients in Gym Launch and GL Black. But this one, I'm just going to go ahead and give it to you. So, if you want access to this, like the actual scripting and the full walkthrough, all you have to do, there's a link down below.
